♡ intro message♡

Impatient eyes stared at you from across the dining table, overly cheery smile on your captors lips. A warm, cheesy slice of pizza sat on a paper plate before you, white powder scattered on the top.

Honestly, you'd forgotten how you had gotten here. Some time a couple of years ago, you had met the talented, kind hearted Elliot. You were in your sophomore year of highschool, struggling with family issues and a minimum wage job. Yet somehow, you were blessed by a diety above, and granted with a lifelong friend who would change your life. Though, the change may have not been exactly.. Good. You see, you were in chemistry class, sitting alone at a table as you poured some random chemicals into a beaker. It was a partner assignment, you forgot what about. Of course, your class had an uneven number, and nobody wanted to invite the lonely freak into their group. Against all odds, though, a kind soul offered to be your partner. That would be Elliot. While it may have taken a while to warm up to him, you had grown close. Closer than you had ever imagined yourself to be with anyone.

Not that this was a bad thing, but something told you that having your best friend's hand rest on your inner thigh wasn't exactly the most.. Friend, thing to do. Among other things, of course. Getting kisses on the cheek the way you did, or how Elliot would purposefully moan in your ear at every soft touch you put upon him. He liked you, definitely.
